summary: Completed frontend testing of Soul Food e-commerce platform. Tested dynamic thumbnails and login persistence after 2FA. Found and fixed 1 bug in CheckoutPage.js where localStorage keys were mismatched. All features now working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed CheckoutPage.js line 723-725: Changed localStorage key checks from 'token'/'user' to also check 'soul_food_token'/'soul_food_user' for compatibility with AuthPage.js
QuickOrder.js dynamic thumbnail logic (lines 1084-1120) is working correctly - uses key prop with selectedEdition for React re-rendering
Backend 2FA verify endpoint (auth_routes_v2.py lines 579-605) correctly returns user data and token after verification
seed_data_creation: Created test users during registration tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All reported bugs have been verified as fixed: 1) Dynamic thumbnails now correctly change when Edition dropdown is changed (Adult→Youth→Instructor), 2) Login persistence after registration/login now works correctly on checkout page. The fix was in CheckoutPage.js to check for the correct localStorage keys (soul_food_token and soul_food_user) that AuthPage.js uses.

dynamic_thumbnails.details: When changing Edition dropdown (Adult→Youth→Instructor), the product image src attribute correctly changes to the corresponding cover image. Tested with Holiday Series: Adult shows /covers/holiday-ae-front-new.png, Youth shows /covers/holiday-ye-front.jpg, Instructor shows /covers/holiday-ie-front.jpg

login_persistence_after_registration.details: After registering a new user, navigating to checkout page shows user as logged in (not prompted for Sign In). User email is pre-filled in checkout form. Fixed by updating CheckoutPage.js to check for soul_food_token and soul_food_user localStorage keys.

login_persistence_beta_user.details: Beta user (instructor/test123) can login and access checkout page without being prompted for login. 2FA is already enabled for beta users.

cart_functionality.details: Items can be added to cart from Quick Order page, cart persists, and checkout page shows cart items correctly.

frontend_ui_tests: Dynamic thumbnail - Adult Edition shows correct image (/covers/holiday-ae-front-new.png)
Dynamic thumbnail - Youth Edition shows correct image (/covers/holiday-ye-front.jpg)
Dynamic thumbnail - Instructor Edition shows correct image (/covers/holiday-ie-front.jpg)
Dynamic thumbnail - Switching back to Adult shows correct image
Registration creates account and redirects to /my-library
Checkout page shows user as logged in after registration
User email pre-filled in checkout form
Beta login (instructor/test123) works and redirects to /my-library
Beta user can access checkout without login prompt
Cart items persist and show on checkout page

checkout_localStorage_keys.issue: CheckoutPage was checking for 'token' and 'user' localStorage keys, but AuthPage stores them as 'soul_food_token' and 'soul_food_user'
checkout_localStorage_keys.fix: Updated to check multiple possible keys: token || soul_food_token || soulFoodToken and user || soul_food_user
